name: Work Opportunity Tax Credit (WOTC)

eligibility.description: Employers must hire members of targeted groups and submit Form 8850 to the designated local agency within 28 days of the employee's start date to certify eligibility.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a federal tax credit to employers who hire individuals from specific targeted groups, such as qualified veterans, ex-felons, and long-term unemployment recipients.
